query: SELECT id, name, CAST(plotAreaSqft AS CHAR) as plotAreaSqft, CAST(manualBuaSqft AS CHAR) as manualBuaSqft, CAST(gfaResidentialSqft AS CHAR) as gfaResidentialSqft, CAST(gfaRetailSqft AS CHAR) as gfaRetailSqft, CAST(landPrice AS CHAR) as landPrice, CAST(estimatedConstructionPricePerSqft AS CHAR) as constructionPrice, CAST(designFeePct AS CHAR) as designFeePct, CAST(supervisionFeePct AS CHAR) as supervisionFeePct FROM projects WHERE id = 3;
